# Release Readiness Checklist

- [ ] Source-of-truth docs current
- [ ] Schemas valid
- [ ] State machines updated
- [ ] ADR updated for major decisions
- [ ] No video bypasses QA
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Manual export works
- [ ] Admin cost view works
